item.title: Learn, todo and done 31/5-4/6/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Done - Project Todo - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Finish the workflow video Finish Changes to test infrastructure #643 Done - Github AOB Finish the draft and send email to BGI legal dept, doc Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 24-28/5/21
item.description: Learn Clean Code, YouTube PHP: The Right Way, link Udemy courses Design Pattern, Doc, Pattern Libraries Postman for testing API, YouTube Essential Scrum, Chapter [5, 7, 17, 18, 19] Terraform Ansible IBMCloud TechWorld What is IaCode DevOps Crash Course, youtube Todo - Project repo, doc Time to pick up taverna again, it could produce excel with all the columns except the publon review link DOI column Peter will help on the getPublonReviewLinkDoi Done - Project Todo - Github Done - Github Get fuw-cicd-#546 running in my computer, review doc at here Ran unit test, functional test, acceptance test and coverage test AOB Drafted email to BGI legal dept, doc Finished 2 rounds of TPM interviews Reference

item.title: Learn, todo and done 17-2/5/21
